title_zh: MultiRef-Compass：迈向多参考音视频生成的全面评估
title_en: MultiRef-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Multi-Reference-to-Audio-Video Generation
summary_zh: 多参考音视频（MR2AV）生成旨在基于多个参考和文本指令生成连贯的音视频内容。现有基准多关注文本驱动生成、单参考主体保留或音视频单独对齐，缺少对MR2AV这一新兴设定的探索。MR2AV需模型联合推理多个参考，生成同步的视听内容，既忠实保留各参考，也正确绑定并组合多实体成连贯事件。为此，本文引入MultiRef-Compass，一个统一的MR2AV基准，包含350个通过可控资源组合管线精心构建的样本，涵盖多视角主体保留、多实体绑定及人-物-场景组合。MultiRef-Compass定义包括基础质量、参考一致性、视听一致性和指令遵循四维指标及14个子指标，结合自动指标与重判增强的大语言模型评审框架，实现对感知质量和参考条件组合的可扩展且可审计评估。八个典型MR2AV系统的实验揭示多维度尚有大幅提升空间，彰显全面基准的必要性，并奠定MultiRef-Compass作为未来MR2AV研究基础。
summary_en: Multi-reference-to-audio-video (MR2AV) generation aims to produce coherent audio-video content conditioned on multiple references and textual instructions. Existing benchmarks mostly focus on text-driven generation, single-reference subject preservation, or isolated audio-video alignment, leaving MR2AV largely unexplored. MR2AV requires models to jointly reason over multiple references while generating synchronized visual and audio content, faithfully preserving and correctly binding multiple referenced entities into coherent events. To address this, MultiRef-Compass is introduced as a unified benchmark comprising 350 carefully curated samples created via a controllable asset-composition pipeline covering multi-view subject preservation, multi-entity binding, and human-object-scene composition. It defines a four-dimensional evaluation protocol—Basic Quality, Reference Consistency, Audio-Visual Consistency, and Instruction Following—using 14 sub-metrics, integrating automatic metrics with a rejudging-enhanced MLLM-as-a-Judge framework for scalable and auditable evaluation of perceptual fidelity and reference-conditioned composition. Experiments on eight representative MR2AV systems reveal significant room for improvement across multiple evaluation aspects, highlighting the need for a comprehensive benchmark and establishing MultiRef-Compass as a foundation for future MR2AV research.
why_it_matters_zh: 多参考音视频生成是音视频生成领域的新兴且具挑战性的任务，现有评估手段难以全面衡量模型对多参考信息的综合理解与融合能力。MultiRef-Compass作为第一个针对该任务的全面评估基准，提供了多维度细粒度指标和结合大语言模型的创新评审框架，为研究者提供统一且可靠的性能评价工具，推动MR2AV技术进步。
why_it_matters_en: Multi-reference-to-audio-video generation is a novel and challenging task requiring comprehensive reasoning and fusion of multiple references, which existing benchmarks fail to adequately evaluate. MultiRef-Compass provides the first comprehensive benchmark with multi-dimensional fine-grained metrics and an innovative MLLM-based judging framework, offering researchers a unified and reliable evaluation tool to advance MR2AV technology development.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: MultiRef-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Multi-Reference-to-Audio-Video Generation. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 76.

title_zh: 推理时概念抑制与面向视频的文本生成视频模型评估
title_en: Inference-Time Concept Suppression and Video-Centric Evaluation for Text-to-Video Models
summary_zh: 文本生成视频（T2V）模型能合成逼真且时间连贯的视频，但如何可控地去除生成器中的目标概念仍具挑战。不同于文本生成图像的概念抹除，T2V去学习需在保留非目标对象、动作、场景及时间结构的同时，抑制跨帧持续存在的目标概念。本文提出了\textbf{SIRUS}，一种无需训练的推理阶段概念级T2V去学习框架。通过目标概念的文本别名，SIRUS定位并抑制采样过程中的相关表达，无需更新文本编码器或去噪网络。同时，设计了视频导向的评估框架，从目标遗忘、非目标保留、视频质量、安全性及效率等多维度评估去学习效果。在CogVideoX数据集上的五种安全、对象和风格概念实验中，SIRUS实现了70.4%的遗忘成功率和25.7%的帧命中率，优于当下VideoEraser方法，且视频质量下降更小，展现了最佳的遗忘与质量权衡。迁移实验也验证了方法对不同T2V骨干的泛化能力。
summary_en: Text-to-video (T2V) models can generate realistic and temporally coherent videos, but controllably removing a target concept is challenging. Unlike text-to-image concept erasure, T2V unlearning must suppress target concepts that persist across frames while preserving non-target elements and temporal structure. This paper proposes SIRUS, a training-free inference-time framework for concept-level T2V unlearning that uses textual aliases to localize and suppress target expressions during sampling without updating model components. Additionally, a video-centric evaluation framework measures target forgetting, non-target preservation, video quality, jailbreak robustness, and efficiency. On the CogVideoX dataset across five concepts, SIRUS achieves 70.4% average forgetting success and 25.7% average frame hit rate, outperforming VideoEraser, with less video quality drop, indicating the best forgetting-quality trade-off. Transfer experiments show generalization to other T2V backbones.
why_it_matters_zh: 当前文本生成视频模型难以高效且可控地消除特定概念，尤其需保持视频连贯性及非目标内容。SIRUS创新地在推理阶段通过文本别名定位抑制目标概念，无需模型更新，提升了实用性与效率。同时提出综合视频级评估标准，使去学习效果更全面有效。该方法显著提升遗忘成功率并减少质量损失，为文本生成视频的概念抑制提供了强有力的技术路径。
why_it_matters_en: Controllably removing specific concepts from text-to-video models is challenging due to the need to preserve temporal coherence and non-target content. SIRUS innovatively suppresses target concepts at inference time using textual aliases without model updates, enhancing practicality and efficiency. Its comprehensive video-level evaluation framework ensures effective assessment. This approach significantly improves forgetting success while minimizing quality degradation, offering a powerful method for concept suppression in text-to-video generation.

title_zh: 将人工智能对齐于动态的人机协作流程
title_en: Align AI to Dynamic Human-AI Workflows
summary_zh: 当前的对齐方法通常聚焦于使用静态的人类偏好表示来模拟人类行为，忽视了现实人机交互中偏好的动态和情境依赖性。本文主张从静态模仿转向互动互补的对齐模式，在该模式下，偏好通过交互逐渐形成，对齐不再仅仅是满足偏好。作者通过将现有对齐与人类和模型行为随时间共同演化的轨迹视角对比，形式化了这一差距。基于跨学科研讨会的见解，结合社会科学关于人类协作的研究，指出人机系统放大了这些动态，带来了新的不确定性推理和协调挑战，并提出了融合机器学习与社会决策科学的研究纲领，以推动互动式人机对齐系统的发展。
summary_en: Current alignment methods focus on emulating human behavior using static representations of preferences, missing the dynamic, context-dependent nature of real human-AI interaction. This paper advocates shifting from static, emulative alignment to interactive and complementary alignment, where preferences emerge through ongoing interaction and alignment goes beyond merely satisfying pre-existing preferences. The authors formalize this gap by contrasting traditional approaches with a trajectory-level view where human and model behaviors co-evolve. Grounded in insights from an interdisciplinary workshop and social-science studies on human collaboration, they highlight how human-AI systems amplify interaction dynamics, creating new asymmetries that complicate uncertainty reasoning and coordination. They conclude by outlining a research agenda that synthesizes machine learning with social and decision sciences to develop AI systems aligned with humans through interaction.
why_it_matters_zh: 本文提出当前静态对齐模型不足以应对现实互动中的复杂动态，强调通过交互生成偏好和具有互补性的对齐方法，能够更好地反映人机共同演化的行为轨迹，从根本上提升AI与人的协作效果，促进更自然高效的人机协作，具有重要的理论和实践价值。
why_it_matters_en: The paper highlights the limitations of static alignment models in capturing the complexity of real-world interactions and argues that interactive, complementary alignment—where preferences evolve through interaction—better reflects the co-evolving behaviors of humans and AI. This foundational shift promises to improve human-AI collaboration, making it more natural and effective, which is of significant theoretical and practical importance.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Align AI to Dynamic Human-AI Workflows. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 71.

title_zh: 控制预算：示例优于旋钮
title_en: The Steering Budget: Examples beat Knobs
summary_zh: 本文提出生成模型的属性调控存在一个“预算”，由训练数据预先设定。旋钮（如提示词、指导尺度、属性标签）只能调控到预算的一部分，而更大且不同的部分则需通过示例进行引导。示例由模型已有知识组合而成，能够跨越旋钮无法覆盖的范围，实现更广泛且更具体的属性表达。本文针对图像和晶体结构生成验证了该理论，并提出了检测和构建示例集的方法。
summary_en: This paper identifies a 'steering budget' for generative models' properties set by training data. Knobs such as prompts or guidance scales control only part of that budget. A larger portion can be steered only by examples—concrete instances leveraging the model's prior knowledge rather than new training data. Using examples enables reaching broader and more expressive targets beyond what knobs alone accomplish. The authors validate this concept in image and crystal-structure generation and provide a method to audit training data and build effective example sets.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究揭示了生成模型调控限制的根源，并提出通过示例超越旋钮限制的方法，提高了属性操控的范围与表达力，有助于更精准地引导生成内容，具有重要理论和实际价值。
why_it_matters_en: This work uncovers the fundamental limits of steering generative models through knobs and demonstrates how examples surpass those limits, broadening reach and expressiveness. This insight advances understanding of model control and offers practical ways to better guide generated outputs for diverse applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The Steering Budget: Examples beat Knobs. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 63.

title_zh: UniSAGE：通过超结构统一静态与动态属性
title_en: UniSAGE: Unifying Static and Dynamic Attributes with Hyper-Structure
summary_zh: 随着数字数据的快速增长，现实应用中越来越多涉及结合静态属性与动态记录的层级信息。对此类异构数据进行统一且具泛化能力的建模仍具挑战。现有方法依赖大量手工设计，且通常将静态与动态属性分开处理，忽视了它们之间的隐含交互。UniSAGE提出了一个统一框架，通过构建全局属性图，表示层级与时间关系，并引入两正交参数子空间，实现静态聚合与动态推理的语义共享。此外，UniSAGE采用轻量级超结构机制实现静动属性的任务特定交互，自动化程度高，对数据结构变动鲁棒。多数据集及真实金融行为数据验证显示，UniSAGE性能超越现有方法多个任务提升逾10%。
summary_en: With the rapid growth of digital data, real-world applications increasingly involve hierarchical information combining static and dynamic attributes. Modeling such heterogeneous data in a unified, generalizable way is challenging. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and treat static and dynamic attributes separately, overlooking implicit interactions. UniSAGE proposes a unified framework constructing a global attribute graph representing hierarchical and temporal relations. It introduces two orthogonal parameter subspaces supporting static aggregation and dynamic reasoning within a shared semantic space. A lightweight hyper-structure enables task-specific interactions between static and dynamic attributes. Fully automated and robust to evolving data schemas, UniSAGE outperforms existing methods by over 10% on multiple benchmarks and a real-world financial behavior dataset.
why_it_matters_zh: UniSAGE通过统一表示静态和动态属性及其交互，解决了数据异构且动态变化带来的挑战，提升了模型泛化能力和性能，为处理复杂层级时序数据提供了先进工具。
why_it_matters_en: By unifying static and dynamic attributes along with their interactions, UniSAGE addresses challenges of heterogeneous and evolving data, enhancing model generalization and performance, providing an advanced tool for complex hierarchical temporal data modeling.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: UniSAGE: Unifying Static and Dynamic Attributes with Hyper-Structure. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 73.
